description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark brown finish and a classic, slightly ornate design. The front features four open shelves, ideal for storing books, decorative items, or other belongings, and a pair of small drawers at the bottom with round brass knobs. The sides and back are solid wood panels, providing structural support and a traditional look. The top of the unit has a slightly protruding, beveled edge, adding a touch of elegance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a broad base for stability. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the shelves are open for easy access.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and two small drawers at the base, featuring a classic, slightly ornate design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and two small drawers with brass knobs at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wooden panel and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, solid wooden back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wooden side panel.
